title: adenocalymma axillare
intro: Adenocalymma axillare is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, commonly known as the "angel's trumpet" due to its trumpet-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Adenocalymma axillare is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
